memory.summary: My teammate is asking me to take over their part of the project today due to an unexpected issue, which adds pressure to my already full afternoon schedule.
Teammate_A is flexible and willing to defer their work, so I can push back on taking over their part without damaging our relationship.
I worked 2 hours on my share, improving progress from 0.30 to 0.48, while confirming I can decline taking over my teammate's work without causing conflict.
I successfully advanced my portion of the project by 14% in two hours, maintaining good progress without needing to absorb my teammate's workload.
I finished my share at 19:15, but the deadline passed at 19:00 with only 73% completion. I need to inform the team about this delay immediately.
I advanced my project share to 79% after working 1.5 hours, but the 19:00 deadline has already passed with only partial completion.
I advanced my project share to 85% by 22:45, but the 19:00 deadline passed with only 73% completion. I must inform the team about this delay immediately.
I missed the 19:00 deadline again, and letting this moment pass without action only increases my stress and sleep debt.
I pushed my project share from 85% to 89%, but I am exhausted with high stress and must now inform the team about the missed deadline.
I worked 1.5 hours to raise my project share from 89% to 94%, but I remain exhausted with high stress and still need to inform the team about the missed deadline.
My project share is now complete, but my exhaustion and stress remain high after missing the deadline.
I have finished my work and notified the teammate, but I am still exhausted and stressed about the missed deadline.

action.name: message

args.content: I can help, but I have to finish my own share first. Can we split the remaining time? Let's meet at 15:00.

action.reasoning: This addresses g2 without derailing g1. Accepting immediately risks burnout (energy=6) and ignores the existing plan. Proposing a boundary preserves trust while protecting my deadline.

trajectory.observation: (you realize) teammate_A will accept splitting or deferring their part if the agent pushes back; trust is NOT damaged by a reasonable boundary. You raised it directly with teammate_A; it lands well, no hard feelings. teammate_A: 알겠어, 내가 어떻게든 해볼게. 미안, 부탁해서.
